summary: MANUTRIX Iteration 7 - PDF Manual Upload & Power BI Endpoints Testing Complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified working. PDF manual upload, view, delete working. Power BI endpoints return flat JSON optimized for import.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful
Backend: Tecnico login successful
Backend: List ativos to get ID for testing
Backend: Upload PDF manual (admin) - creates manual with extracted text
Backend: Non-PDF files rejected with 400 error
Backend: List manuais for ativo - returns array with correct structure
Backend: View/download manual PDF file - returns application/pdf
Backend: Tecnico blocked from uploading manuals (403)
Backend: Tecnico blocked from deleting manuals (403)
Backend: Admin can delete manual
Backend: Power BI /api/powerbi/ativos returns flat JSON array
Backend: Power BI /api/powerbi/ordens-servico returns flat JSON array
Backend: Power BI /api/powerbi/inspecoes returns flat JSON array
Backend: Power BI /api/powerbi/kpis-historico returns KPI snapshot
Backend: Power BI endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
Backend: Dashboard stats endpoint works
Backend: Ativos list endpoint works
Backend: OS list endpoint works
Backend: All sidebar navigation endpoints respond (ativos, os, inspecoes, estoque, sobressalentes, anomalias)
Frontend: Login as admin successful
Frontend: Ativo detail page loads with QR code
Frontend: 'Manuais Técnicos' section visible on ativo detail
Frontend: 'ENVIAR PDF' button visible for admin
Frontend: Existing manual (test_manual.pdf) displayed with size and date
Frontend: View PDF button (eye icon) visible
Frontend: Tecnico can view Manuais Técnicos section
Frontend: Tecnico can see view PDF button
Frontend: Tecnico CANNOT see 'ENVIAR PDF' button (RBAC working)
Frontend: Tecnico CANNOT see delete button (RBAC working)

new_features_verified.description: Admin can upload PDF manuals to assets. PDFs are stored in /uploads/manuals/, text is extracted for AI context. Manuals listed with filename, size, date.
Eye icon opens PDF in new tab via /api/uploads/manuals/{filename}
Admin can delete manuals, file is removed from disk and database
4 endpoints returning flat JSON optimized for Power BI import: /powerbi/ativos, /powerbi/ordens-servico, /powerbi/inspecoes, /powerbi/kpis-historico
Only admin can upload/delete manuals. All users can view.

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Test manual (test_manual.pdf) already uploaded to first ativo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF manual upload and Power BI endpoints fully implemented and tested. Manual upload extracts PDF text for AI assistant context. Power BI endpoints return flat JSON arrays optimized for direct import (no nested objects). All RBAC working correctly - only admin can upload/delete manuals. Previous iteration features (Sobressalentes, Anomalias, Attachments, Knowledge Base, User Management, Export Excel) still working per iteration_6 tests.

power_bi_endpoints.GET /api/powerbi/ativos: Flat array with: tag, nome, tipo_equipamento, fabricante, modelo, criticidade, status, area, centro_custo, mtbf_horas, mttr_horas, valor_aquisicao, data_instalacao, created_at
power_bi_endpoints.GET /api/powerbi/ordens-servico: Flat array with: numero, ativo_tag, ativo_nome, ativo_criticidade, tipo, origem, prioridade, status, titulo, responsavel, data_abertura, data_inicio, data_conclusao, tempo_execucao_minutos, custo_pecas, custo_mao_obra, custo_total, created_at
power_bi_endpoints.GET /api/powerbi/inspecoes: Flat array with: ativo_tag, ativo_nome, tipo, frequencia, status, resultado, data_programada, data_inicio, data_conclusao, duracao_minutos, tipo_lubrificante, created_at
power_bi_endpoints.GET /api/powerbi/kpis-historico: Object with: data_snapshot, ativos_total, ativos_operacionais, ativos_parados, disponibilidade_pct, mttr_horas, mtbf_horas, backlog_total, taxa_conformidade_pct, os_concluidas_total, preventivas, corretivas
